source: Vitess vtgate exporter (github.com/vitessio/vitess) — partial whitelist curated from public docs + go/vt/{vtgate,servenv} stats.New* call sites. Vitess exporter has no static schema; metrics are registered at runtime so this list will need expansion as more real /metrics dumps are contributed.
method: Manual curation from vitess docs/reference/programs/vtgate/ + go/vt/vtgate/*.go grep 'stats.New'. PR with a real /metrics dump to expand.
